name: Bernie 2020
subject: Your last chance to claim your FREE Bernie bumper sticker:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
One last chance – wanted to make sure you got it.

# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1629%2E150750%2EPvbuVF)
Friends -
For the past few days, our campaign has been offering free Bernie 2020 bumper stickers to anyone who wants one.
Tomorrow we’re going to send the list of people who requested one to the distributor, and we’ll get them in the mail shortly after.
But before we send that list, we wanted to give you one last chance to get your name on it:
[**Tell us where to send your bumper sticker before midnight tonight and we’ll get it out to you ASAP.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/bernie-2020-sticker/?source=em190606-2-45&refcode2=1629.150750.PvbuVF&t=2&akid=1629%2E150750%2EPvbuVF)
[](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/bernie-2020-sticker/?source=em190606-2-45&refcode2=1629.150750.PvbuVF&t=3&akid=1629%2E150750%2EPvbuVF)
Right now it’s looking like stickers should hit mailboxes late next week or early on in the week after. Tell us where to send yours.
[**https://act.berniesanders.com/go/Free-Sticker**](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/bernie-2020-sticker/?source=em190606-2-45&refcode2=1629.150750.PvbuVF&t=4&akid=1629%2E150750%2EPvbuVF)
All our best,
Team Bernie
[GET YOUR STICKER](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/bernie-2020-sticker/?source=em190606-2-45&refcode2=1629.150750.PvbuVF&t=5&akid=1629%2E150750%2EPvbuVF)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=1629%2E150750%2EPvbuVF). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=7&akid=1629%2E150750%2EPvbuVF). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=8&refcode2=1629_150750_PvbuVF&akid=1629%2E150750%2EPvbuVF).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=9&akid=1629%2E150750%2EPvbuVF).

We knew when we launched our campaign that making the first debate would be a challenge.

Governor Bullock was one of the last candidates to announce. And there's a good reason why:

He is the sitting Governor of a red state with a nearly 60% Republican legislature. It meets for just 90 days once every two years.

**Governor Bullock spent January through May expanding Medicaid, freezing college tuition, banning foreign money from state elections, and protecting a woman 's right to make her own healthcare decisions.**

At every opportunity, Governor Bullock will choose to improve the lives of everyday people over appeasing a handful of Washington insiders.

But we've proven we have the support to participate in the first debate time and time again.

If Democrats want to win back the places we lost like Michigan and Wisconsin, the DNC shouldn't bar the only Democrat who has won a Trump state. If Democrats want to win back middle America and not leave out the voice of rural voters, the DNC can't just focus on patches of deep blue.

I'm hoping you and our thousands of grassroots supporters will help us fight back right now.

name: Team Joe
subject: The right to health care should not be dependent on someone's zip code.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Women's rights and women's health care are under assault in a way that seeks to roll back every step of progress we've made over the last 50 years. | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931943a/1cd0ac28/27b38c46/356cac77/3624723017/VEsH/ "https://www.joebiden.com")
---
Peter --

Women's rights and women's health care are under assault in a way that seeks to roll back every step of progress we've made over the last 50 years.

Providers like Planned Parenthood are under attack. Many Republican governors are denying health coverage to millions of the poorest Americans by refusing to expand Medicaid. State after state is passing extreme laws in clear violation of the constitutional right protected by _Roe v. Wade_ \-- some going so far as to deny exceptions even for rape and incest.

**That 's why Joe Biden said tonight that he can no longer support an amendment that makes the right to health care dependent on someone's zip code.**

We cannot leave millions of people without access to the care they need, or the ability to exercise a constitutionally protected right to choose.

As President, Joe Biden will continue to fight to protect a woman's right to make her own personal decisions about her health care.

Thank you for listening, Peter.

\- Team Joe
|
---

name: Teresa
subject: If someone takes 7 months to get a job done, you fire them
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/74264/images/tt2020%20email%20header.png]
Dear Friend,

Finally, after more than seven months, Georgia farmers, and all those who suffered from the devastation caused by Hurricane Michael are getting the disaster relief they deserve.

It’s been 239 days since Hurricane Michael made landfall in Georgia and ravaged our agricultural and rural communities. We must do better.

Add your name now and tell David Perdue: seven months is TOO LONG for Georgia farmers, and victims of any natural disasters, to wait for the aid they deserve: [https://teresatomlinson.com/add-your-name-georgia-farmers-need-relief/?ms=060619-b]

ADD YOUR NAME [https://teresatomlinson.com/add-your-name-georgia-farmers-need-relief/?ms=060619-b]

If you can believe it, 58 Members of Congress voted against the bill to provide relief to hurricane survivors – they are extremists willing to hold Georgia farmers and tens of thousands of Americans hostage to their ideological demands.

It’s no different than the political games David Perdue played with disaster relief when he was one of only 16 U.S. senators who voted against the disaster relief bill in 2017: [https://teresatomlinson.com/add-your-name-georgia-farmers-need-relief/?ms=060619-b]

[https://lh5.googleusercontent.com/UUbOf0MfeDDnmwTKv95lNYUEYQdf7uEexqDM4QkE4zjhmLD_sHDpIihk7sMtHANZWKD_nmWuaz358-PxpMeAR7Kv1TakjTtX6jRsUrTiFvtTcNtXnSiH6GBj9_9WdM6VhpkAEmkB] >> https://teresatomlinson.com/add-your-name-georgia-farmers-need-relief/?ms=060619-b

With such cynical games being played in DC, it’s no wonder most Americans are turned off by what they see coming out of Washington.

And just look at the consequences these political games are having for Georgians. For too many, this bill is too little, too late. The planting season for many crops began months ago, and some farmers have been forced to either sit the entire season out or make incredibly hard financial decisions for their families. That is unacceptable.

Teresa

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: Did you hear what our Congressman did this week?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nicole for New York (FEDERAL)
body:
You don't want to miss this.
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Friend,
This week, Max voted to open the door to amnesty for more than 2.5 million illegal immigrants, including known gang members and those with DUIs and firearm convictions. The bill, which he "proudly" co-sponsored, even prohibits the Department of Homeland Security from accessing state and federal gang databases to prevent Green Cards from getting into the wrong hands. All of this will cost you $35 billion without allocating a penny toward border security to resolve our current crisis.
Unfortunately, that's not all.
Max spent the week pushing for a massive taxpayer-funded campaign finance system that would give up to $5 million in our tax dollars to each federal campaign.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump’s Words Show How Sovereignty Can Serve Western Values
body:
"Hell froze over Thursday, as Donald Trump delivered a speech in Europe that even his critics applauded." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ef80a19dd7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **President Trump’s Words Show How Sovereignty Can Serve Western Values**

“Hell froze over Thursday, as Donald Trump delivered a speech in Europe that even his critics applauded. His remarks on the 75th anniversary of the D-Day landing at Normandy were stirring, and the occasion offers a lesson about the values that unite the Western alliance,” _The Wall Street Journal_ editorial board writes.

“In his ode to the soldiers who stormed the beaches and parachuted behind Nazi lines, Mr. Trump pointed to their larger motivation. ‘These men ran through the fires of hell moved by a force no weapon could destroy: the fierce patriotism of a free, proud, and sovereign people,’ he said to applause. ‘They battled not for control and domination, but for liberty, democracy, and self-rule.’”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=85cb403002&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Calling the surprising May surge in illegal immigrant arrests on the border the ‘worst case scenario,’ a top immigration analyst has boosted the expected level of crossings 10%, to over 1 million,” Paul Bedard reports for the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8aa5645a6e&e=3ee4985eea). “U.S. Customs and Border Protection on Wednesday revealed that May apprehensions topped 144,000. This year has seen 676,315 apprehensions so far, up 99% over this time last year.”
---
|
---
| “Vice President Mike Pence honored the U.S. soldiers who stormed the beaches of Normandy 75 years ago on D-Day during a speech Thursday at the National D-Day Memorial” in Bedford, Virginia—a small town that lost 19 men on Omaha Beach, Andrew O’Reilly reports for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a1e56bc17e&e=3ee4985eea). “That such a small town could make such a sacrifice seems beyond belief,” the Vice President said.
---
|
---
| “The media has a simple script. When the president is a Republican abroad, the correct approach is to blame everything on him and play up as many negatives as possible. But when the president is a liberal, anything less that fulsome applause is a betrayal of the tradition [than] politics stops at the water’s edge,” Ted Bromund writes in [_The Daily Signal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bd63104e99&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “President Trump’s tough approach to trade with China is evidence that he’s an entrepreneur at heart,” former head of the Small Business Administration Hector Barreto writes in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=979aae1c42&e=3ee4985eea). “For decades, America’s approach to China’s bad behavior has been as cautious as a corporate CEO . . . The Chinese always smile and say ‘yes,’ and then continue doing what they’ve always done.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1223c20172&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=998d7b786c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=f4d8de59c6)
---

---

Take a look at what the President of NARAL had to say about Tim Ryan this week:
[](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9f86/5486deaa/2047b3fd/dc98195/2920372156/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/signup/repeal-the-hyde-amendment?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_30DO_190607_1_1_T1&source=TR_EM_FR_30DO_190607_1_1_T1") The Hyde Amendment IS an obstacle to women seeking abortion access. Tim Ryan believes: _The Hyde Amendment is a tax on millions of Americans seeking abortion access. It 's wrong and should be repealed. name: Our Revolution
subject: Help Yasmine Taeb beat the top corporate Democrat in the Virginia Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Yasmine Taeb is running in the most important election in Virginia this summer.
# [](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a488/bed43eb/9311f4f6/75fabcd6/3276410501/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-header-OR")
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a488/bed43eb/9311f4f6/75fabcd1/3276410501/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/volunteer-with-yamine-taeb?source=em190607")
Friends,
We're in the final stretch to make history in northern Virginia. People are noticing insurgent Yasmine Taeb has been gaining momentum against corporate Democrat State Senator Dick Saslaw. [_The Washington Post_](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a488/bed43eb/9311f4f6/75fabcd0/3276410501/VEsF/ "https://www.washingtonpost.com/local/virginia-politics/va-candidate-backed-by-democratic-socialists-draws-attacks-from-senate-minority-leader-richard-saslaw/2019/06/05/a0e6c7ca-8705-11e9-98c1-e945ae5db8fb_story.html") recently covered her exciting race, and Our Revolution helped deliver nearly 50 volunteers last weekend.
Our Revolution members need to do it again if Yasmine is to win and open up a pathway for progressive legislation to reach the governor's desk next fall. If Democrats win back the Senate, Saslaw would become the party's majority leader. In this position, he would likely only allow pro-dirty energy legislation through and be able to block a pro-worker agenda, such as repealing right to work. We cannot allow this to happen. Our Revolution is asking for volunteers this weekend to elect one of our own members at the following crucial events.
**[On Sunday, June 9th from 6:00 to 9:00 PM you can join us and other progressive allies for a rally at Clare& Don's Beach Shack located at 130 N Washington St, Falls Church, VA 22046.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a488/bed43eb/9311f4f6/75fabcd1/3276410501/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/volunteer-with-yamine-taeb?source=em190607")**
In addition, on Sunday and Monday, volunteers will be doing a last chance phonebank party.
**Location** : 6374 Lakeview Drive, Falls Church, VA 22041
**[Sunday Times](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a488/bed43eb/9311f4f6/75fabcd1/3276410501/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/volunteer-with-yamine-taeb?source=em190607")** : 3:00 to 8:30 pm
**[ _Monday Times_](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a488/bed43eb/9311f4f6/75fabcd1/3276410501/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/volunteer-with-yamine-taeb?source=em190607")** : 4:00 to 8:30 pm
[_**Sign up to volunteer for our get-out-the-vote push today.**_](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a488/bed43eb/9311f4f6/75fabcd1/3276410501/VEsB/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/volunteer-with-yamine-taeb?source=em190607")

| Team,

When I announced the Green New Deal resolution with Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, I knew we were at the start of something that would transform our democracy and our economy.

[](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-2019-membership?refcode=EM-060719&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

| Derek, In 1989, I had the opportunity to work directly under Governor John H. Sununu in the Governor's Energy Office. My director always spoke of what a great honor and privilege it was to work for the Governor - and he was right. As a letter-appointed staff member I worked for the Governor for two years and it was an exciting time. He was was instrumental in getting then Vice President Bush elected President (can you imagine a PRESIDENT Dukakis?) and serving as his Chief of Staff. Since then he has been a tremendous advocate for conservative and Republican causes supporting the NHGOP and all of us Republicans as a frequent guest on Fox News. [On June 22, we have an equally great privilege to celebrate the Governor's 80th birthday at an ice cream and cake social.](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xMTczMzE4ODUwNjUzOTgzODYzJmM9ZDRrOSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNTU2MzAwMDAmZD15NWo4ZzNn.PdkKVsoF8_JBy96Jn-WRQrQQqG-M0s9wBPd07iCA9nc) We are putting together a program booklet to wish the Governor a happy birthday and I need your help for it to be a success. I was hoping that every county and city committee would take out an advertisement in the book. Below are the prices.
Also individuals can wish the Governor a _Happy Birthday_ with a $50 individual birthday listing. I would love to see 200 Republicans thank Governor Sununu in this way. [Can you help encourage people to support the party and the Governor by contacting the people on your list to buy a $50 listing?](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xMTczMzE4ODUwNjUzOTgzODYzJmM9ZDRrOSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNTU2MzAwMDImZD1lNmMzazdr.j4OT5TOM4IqtEfts2YXS7jDJoqXI02GhCpL3E6ObWqA)

name: Joe Biden 2020
subject: On Gun Violence Prevention Day:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We need action. But the NRA and gun manufacturers have such a firm grip on Republicans in Congress that they refuse to consider common sense gun reforms. | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319435/1cd0ac28/271f5471/356ca865/2190672969/VEsH/ "https://www.joebiden.com")
---
Peter --

Today is National Gun Violence Prevention Day. Our team, and people across the country, are wearing orange in remembrance of the countless lives that have been cut short by senseless acts of gun violence in America -- from the mass shootings that make headlines to the daily acts of violence in our streets and homes that don't.

We need action. **But the NRA and gun manufacturers have such a firm grip on Republicans in Congress that they refuse to consider common sense gun reforms.**

Peter -- this is politics at its worst. We should all feel safe to walk the streets of our own cities and towns. Our workers should feel safe at work. Our students should always feel safe at school.

[If you agree, sign your name to join Joe in the fight to end gun violence »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319435/1cd0ac28/271f5471/356ca864/2190672969/VEsE/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/stop-gun-violence?source=email-bsd-20190607GVP-b1_PET_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190607GVP&utm_content=b1_PET_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1") | | [**SIGN MY NAME »**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319435/1cd0ac28/271f5471/356ca864/2190672969/VEsF/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/stop-gun-violence?source=email-bsd-20190607GVP-b1_PET_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190607GVP&utm_content=b1_PET_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1")
---
We don't need to convince the American public that common-sense measures to reduce gun violence are a good idea. 2 in 3 people believe that we need stricter gun laws.

There are actions that Congress can take right now if they were to listen to the majority of the American people who want to see our government take action to stop gun violence. We will be rolling policies to reduce gun violence in the coming months, but it's clear:
* We need to close the loophole that allows individuals to buy guns online or at gun shows without undergoing a background check.
* We need to ban the sale of assault weapons and high-capacity magazines.

We can't let a special interest group dictate the safety of the rest of the country. **That 's why defeating the NRA is a key element of our education policy we introduced last week.**

[So Peter, stand with us and join the fight to end gun violence »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319435/1cd0ac28/271f5471/356ca864/2190672969/VEsC/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/stop-gun-violence?source=email-bsd-20190607GVP-b1_PET_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190607GVP&utm_content=b1_PET_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1")

Joe Biden knows how to beat the NRA because he's done it before -- twice. He shepherded through the passage of the Brady background check bill in 1993, and then 10-year bans on assault weapons and high-capacity magazines in 1994. As President, Joe Biden will defeat the NRA again.

[Join him and sign you name to pledge to defeat gun violence »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319435/1cd0ac28/271f5471/356ca864/2190672969/VEsD/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/stop-gun-violence?source=email-bsd-20190607GVP-b1_PET_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190607GVP&utm_content=b1_PET_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1")

subject: All politics are local
body:
All politics are local. It’s an old adage, I’m sure you’ve heard it, and it means that no matter whether you’re running for president... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/all-politics-are-local?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **_All Politics Are Local_**
All politics are local. It’s an old adage, I’m sure you’ve heard it, and it means that no matter whether you’re running for president of the United States or town council, the local issues of the time and place will dominate the day. And that adage was especially true this week for **State Rep.-elect Dollyne Sherman**, who won a caucus on Tuesday night of 34 Republican precinct committeemen to fill the remainder of **David Frizzel’s **term in the Indiana House of Representatives.

**Rep.-elect Sherman** won the caucus on the first ballot, and her victory can largely be attributed to her focus on local issues and her hard work campaigning. She took the time to go door-to-door and listen to her new constituents. And her top issue? She’s dedicated to monitoring the completion of I-69, which will cut through her district, as the interstate is completed three years ahead of schedule. It doesn’t get much more local than that (read more about **Rep.-elect Sherman** and the caucus [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e4f9d06b4e&e=1acd9bb3d6)).

The same thing is also true for each of our candidates on the ballot this year. In local races for offices like mayor, city council, town council or clerk-treasurer, everything revolves around the biggest issues in the community, whether that’s repaving Main Street or getting more patrol officers in neighborhoods. All politics are local.

If you’re a candidate for office this year, if you’re considering running in the next few years, or if you’re working on campaigns, we’ve got [an event coming up this month](x-webdoc://8B2134FB-5656-4074-8473-4F9C9FA1AE29/indiana.gop/battlegroundindiana) where top campaign experts will teach you how to connect with voters on the local level, among other topics. It’s our big municipal training seminar, [Battleground Indiana: Winning Indiana’s Cities & Towns](x-webdoc://8B2134FB-5656-4074-8473-4F9C9FA1AE29/indiana.gop/battlegroundindiana), and registration closes next Thursday. I’m looking at what we have planned (more to be announced next week, and it’s GREAT!), and it’s something you’ll definitely want to [RSVP for now](x-webdoc://8B2134FB-5656-4074-8473-4F9C9FA1AE29/indiana.gop/battlegroundindiana).

Congratulations, **Rep.-elect Sherman** , and don’t forget that with politics, it’s all local.

-Kyle Hupfer

_**PHOTO: Rep.-elect Sherman** poses for a photo with **Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer** and **Johnson County Republican Party Chairwoman Beth Boyce **following the caucus. _
---
|

| **_Honoring Our Heroes: D-Day at 75_** Yesterday marked the 75th anniversary of D-Day, the historic day when American troops and our allies stormed the beaches of Normandy, giving their last full measure of devotion so that our nation – and freedom for the world – might live on.
Earlier this year, **Governor Eric** **Holcomb** visited Omaha Beach and laid a wreath on behalf of all Hoosiers at the Normandy American Cemetery. Check out some photos from his visit as **Governor Holcomb** reflected on the sacrifices those soldiers made and the freedoms they preserved.

| **_One Week Left:
RSVP for _**_******Battleground Indiana: Winning Indiana's Cities & Towns**_ The deadline is less than one week away! Later this month, we have [a big training event designed](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d31570be93&e=1acd9bb3d6) with our 2019 Republican municipal candidates in mind, all with the goal of helping you and your campaign team build the skills you’ll need to cross the finish line FIRST on Election Night!

[RSVP now](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d501b1c3aa&e=1acd9bb3d6) to secure your spot so you can attend this event on Saturday, June 15, and have access to:
* Breakout sessions on important topics like building a campaign plan, using political data, recruiting volunteers, communicating with voters, and more
* Panel discussions with Indiana Republican mayors and opportunities to ask questions
* Training on the latest campaign technology for voter contact
* An evening reception with **Governor Eric Holcomb** and **Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer**!

Together, we can ensure that Republicans continue to deliver results for Hoosiers in cities and towns across Indiana! Make sure to [RSVP now](x-webdoc://0C81CD37-EA26-43FC-97D4-2BCD85B3AA68/indiana.gop/battlegroundindiana) before the deadline next Thursday – in less than a week!

| _**Applications Now Open: **
******Apply for the Lugar Series**_
Are you a woman interested in expanding your civic engagement? Are you looking for an opportunity to make an impact in your community and build your leadership skills? The Richard G. Lugar Excellence in Public Service Series, now in its 30th year, was created for you!

Applications are now available for the 2019-2020 class. Learn more about the program [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ad67f67eda&e=1acd9bb3d6), and download the application [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e5ebf9e558&e=1acd9bb3d6) – which is due on August 1

| **_Did Elizabeth Warren Learn Anything From Hoosiers?_**
This week, far-left Democrat Elizabeth Warren made campaign stops in Elkhart and Fort Wayne, and we’re hoping that she might have learned something during her time here. That’s because her liberal ideology doesn’t jibe with Hoosiers.
Here’s what **Chairman Kyle Hupfer** had to say on her visit:

_"We're happy to welcome Elizabeth Warren to Indiana, a state where balanced budgets, low taxes and less government red tape have led to a booming economy with great high-wage jobs available in all corners of our state.

"If Warren sticks around and actually listens to Hoosiers, she might just learn that innovation and growth don't come from big government programs and oppressive taxes -- they come from fiscal responsibility and less government. It's clear, though, that Elizabeth Warren is stuck on government being the solution to every problem, a far-left liberal ideology that doesn't jibe with Hoosiers."_

subject: Donald Trump's *new* child prisons:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2a64d/6cd27893/4ced4d96/15805c28/1198788442/VEsH/ "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")

| | **I wish it weren't true, but I have to report a new horror: Donald Trump is planning to open more huge, unregulated child prisons.** After all we've seen, Team Trump's answer is to double down on the inhumane treatment of immigrant and refugee children. [**This doesn't represent who we are. Stand against their cruelty. Sign the petition and say you oppose any new child prisons.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2a64d/6cd27893/4ced4d96/15805c29/1198788442/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "https://www.jeffmerkley.com/petition/no-new-child-prisons/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-06-no-new-child-prisons-email") These prisons wouldn't be subject to state child welfare requirements. name: Danielle Hirshberg, Team Hickenlooper
subject: Why I'll feel safer with John as President:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
It matters that our next president stand up proudly, forcefully and unequivocally for women's rights to control our bodies and our futures--as John does right here. Watch now. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377161c/691c9bd/6c3dc879/11a4e5e7/1117700338/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

I want to get personal for a second.

I'm 26, part of a generation that has always enjoyed the protections of _Roe v. Wade_. But now, state by state, we're seeing continuous, relentless attacks on reproductive rights and abortion access. And, like so many women across the country, I'm _gravely_ concerned about what could happen to those rights if and when Donald Trump's two new Supreme Court justices get to weigh in.

**It matters that our next president stand up proudly, forcefully, and unequivocally for women 's rights to control our bodies and our futures--as John does right here. Watch now.**
[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377161c/691c9bd/6c3dc879/11a4e5e4/1117700338/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-maddow?refcode=em_fr_20190607_BK_20190607-watch-DH-maddow-ndnr_ndnr_i1&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

John (or "Gov," as we call him) doesn't just _believe_ in reproductive rights--he has _acted_ on those beliefs. As Governor of Colorado, he implemented a groundbreaking program that ensured **long-acting reversible contraceptive access ( "LARC") for all women across the state. Teen pregnancies plunged and the state saved $70 million.**

As president, he'll work to repeal the Hyde Amendment (which massively restricts federal funding for abortion access and disproportionately affects low-income women) **and choose Supreme Court Justices who accept _Roe_ as settled law.**

I'm so proud to be on Gov's team because he cares so deeply and genuinely about people's well-being. John remembers life before _Roe_ --and he's committed to making sure the horrors of that time are never repeated.

[**_Watch John speak about his commitment to reproductive rights on Rachel Maddow. Then, can you make your first donation to help us grow our momentum and keep a spotlight on this fight?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377161c/691c9bd/6c3dc879/11a4e5e5/1117700338/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-maddow?refcode=em_fr_20190607_BK_20190607-watch-DH-maddow-ndnr_ndnr_l1&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,

Danielle

Danielle Hirshberg
Creative Director
Hickenlooper 2020
---

---

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Where can I send you a copy of my new book?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
I hope this works...

# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1640%2E150750%2E1DGrR0)
Sisters and Brothers -
Shortly after the last election, I released a new book: _Where We Go From Here._
It turned out to be a sequel to another book I wrote, _Our Revolution._
That book laid out a new path for America based on the principles of economic, social, racial, and environmental justice. This new book is about what I and millions of progressives have been trying to accomplish since then.
I want you to read it -- _Where We Go From Here_ -- because this campaign, the one we are in right now, is an extension of that story. It's the next chapter.
[**Make a contribution — OF ANY AMOUNT — to our campaign today and we’ll send you a copy of my new book,_Where We Go From Here._ This offer will only last for a limited time. **](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/14754?refcode=em190607-1-60&t=3&akid=1640%2E150750%2E1DGrR0) [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/14754?refcode=em190607-1-60&t=4&akid=1640%2E150750%2E1DGrR0)
[GET THE BOOK](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/14754?refcode=em190607-1-60&t=5&akid=1640%2E150750%2E1DGrR0)
There will be some folks who might only be able to afford to contribute a lot less than the book cost us, and that's fine. I want them to read the book. There might even be some people who contribute $1 because they want to cost our campaign money.
So be it — I hope they enjoy the book too.
**But if you can contribute more, we would appreciate it. You'll help defray the cost of the book for others and power our political revolution ahead of this critical FEC deadline because 100% of the proceeds from the book sales go directly to our campaign:**
So what do you say?
[**Make a contribution — OF ANY AMOUNT — to our campaign today and we’ll send you a copy of my new book,_Where We Go From Here._ **](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/14754?refcode=em190607-1-60&t=6&akid=1640%2E150750%2E1DGrR0)
This book is a kind of personal narrative. It takes you behind the scenes. I hope you’ll read it.
And if you do, and make a donation to our campaign today, you’ll help us writing the next chapter of our story.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
[GET THE BOOK](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/14754?refcode=em190607-1-60&t=7&akid=1640%2E150750%2E1DGrR0)

PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402

In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=10&refcode2=1640_150750_1DGrR0&akid=1640%2E150750%2E1DGrR0).

name: Booker HQ
subject: This is where we stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, The DNC debate stage donor deadline is in just 5 days. We have less than a week to get as many donors (and donations) as possible before our numbers become public to the DNC. If we don't have a good showing next week, we could lose the momentum we've built together. We know that with your help, this grassroots team can have a strong showing. But we need your help. The finance team ran the numbers and said our records indicate that we need 19 donors from your ZIP code to stay on track for our fundraising before the DNC donor audit. [**Can you step up and chip in $1 today?**](https://act.corybooker. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190607-em?refcode=em_fr_20190607_BHQ_20190607-fr-BHQ-dncmicrogo-actives_2020ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") While Cory's rejecting corporate PACs and special interest money, some of our opponents aren't. The only way a campaign like ours can compete -- and make up for big fundraising gaps -- is with a huge rush of support from people like you. We're running a campaign built by the people for the people, but that's no easy task. It's the reason why we can't afford to fall behind and lapse on our goals. [_**Can you be one of 19 donors from your ZIP code? Rush in a donation now to make sure we don't fall behind in fundraising before the DNC donor deadline >>**_](https://act.corybooker. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190607-em?refcode=em_fr_20190607_BHQ_20190607-fr-BHQ-dncmicrogo-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks, Team Cory
_**[](https://act.corybooker. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190607-em?refcode=em_fr_20190607_BHQ_20190607-fr-BHQ-dncmicrogo-dnr_dnr_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc091d/5fca0d19/5b5918d/291b560d/4127907647/VEsA/ "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc091d/5fca0d19/5b5918d/291b560c/4127907647/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc091d/5fca0d19/5b5918d/291b560b/4127907647/VEsO/ "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc091d/5fca0d19/5b5918d/291b560a/4127907647/VEsP/ "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
